summary: Reframed the opening so Chapter 17 enters through Leni's encounter with the post-rain quiet and dry stone rather than repeating Chapter 18's light-first morning scaffold. Core beats, dialogue, and the handoff into the first-light naming remain intact. No style-bible calibration lines appeared verbatim, so no replacement was needed.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph around quiet, touch, and the window as the first spatial anchor.
Folded Bram's empty mat reveal into the revised opening so the chapter keeps the same narrative information with a distinct entry shape.
